title: Implementation of Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India - Report of the Task Force
summary: Department of Science & Technology task force report under the National Quantum Mission setting out India's national strategy for migration to post-quantum cryptography, including phased timelines for critical information infrastructure, mandatory cryptographic inventories, crypto-agile design and a national PQC testing and certification framework.

title: Report on Quantum-Safe Ecosystem in India
summary: Department of Science & Technology report under the National Quantum Mission on building a quantum-safe ecosystem, covering post-quantum cryptography migration pathways, a national testing and certification programme, hybrid deployment frameworks and crypto-agile PKI.

title: Transitioning to Quantum Cyber Readiness (CERT-In Whitepaper CIWP-2025-0002)
summary: CERT-In information whitepaper (with MeitY and SISA) providing a strategic, step-by-step roadmap for public and private organisations to transition cybersecurity frameworks to quantum-resilient / post-quantum cryptography, prioritising critical sectors such as BFSI, defence and health.

title: MeitY launches whitepaper to guide India's shift towards Atmanirbhar & Quantum-Safe Cybersecurity
summary: Press Information Bureau (Government of India) release announcing the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology whitepaper 'Transitioning to Quantum Cyber Readiness', which sets out India's approach to post-quantum / quantum-safe cybersecurity.

title: Technical Report on Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography (TEC 910018:2025)
summary: Telecommunication Engineering Centre technical report (TEC 910018:2025) on migration to post-quantum cryptography, providing a reference framework for the Indian telecom sector's transition to quantum-safe algorithms.

title: Cybersecurity and Cyber Resilience Framework (CSCRF) for SEBI Regulated Entities
summary: SEBI circular establishing the Cybersecurity and Cyber Resilience Framework for regulated entities, which requires periodic post-quantum risk assessment and maintenance of cryptographic-asset inventories to prepare for migration to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Technical Clarifications to the CSCRF for SEBI Regulated Entities
summary: SEBI circular issuing technical clarifications to the CSCRF, including the expected approach for maintaining cryptographic-asset inventories and prioritising assets for post-quantum cryptography migration.

title: Securing the Indian Banking Sector in the Age of Quantum Computing
summary: Reserve Bank Innovation Hub (an RBI subsidiary) whitepaper recommending that Indian banks proactively transition to post-quantum cryptography algorithms designed to resist quantum attacks. Flagged for review: hosted on a non-government S3 domain and issued by an RBI subsidiary rather than the central bank directly.
